ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used (e.g., walking, driving, cycling) */,
  "start_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting location of the trip */,
  "end_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending location of the trip */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the trip */,
  "route" TEXT /* JSON or text representation of the route taken */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, developer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip during which the location was visited */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was visited */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the location data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the location data (e.g., GPS, mobile app) */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode (e.g., walking, driving, cycling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed for the mode */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency for the mode (if applicable) */,
  "emissions" REAL /* Emissions for the mode (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip to which the segment belongs */,
  "start_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting location of the segment */,
  "end_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending location of the segment */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the segment */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the segment */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the segment */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the segment */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the segment */,
  "route" TEXT /* JSON or text representation of the route taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_segments_end_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_segments_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_segments_start_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip for which the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trip summary, user behavior) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Detailed content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_length" INTEGER /* Length of the report in characters or pages */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip for which the payment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system with which the integration is made */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last sync */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the sync (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., server, client) */,
  "log_stack_trace" TEXT /* Stack trace of the log entry (if applicable) */,
  "log_duration" REAL /* Duration of the log entry (e.g., time taken for a process) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
